ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the article was last modified */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the article is featured */,
  "seo_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for SEO optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the author */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the author was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the author's information was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the author (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the author's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being viewed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the view event */,
  "granularity" TEXT /* Granularity of the data (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., all-access) */,
  "agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser type) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the article */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who viewed the article */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* URL of the referring page */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_access_type FOREIGN KEY ("access_type") REFERENCES access_types ("access_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_types" (
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access type */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Name of the access type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being engaged with */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the article */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., read, comment) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of engagement in seconds */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the platform (e.g., reader, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the user's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., new article, comment reply) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_via" TEXT /* Method by which the notification was sent (e.g., email, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being rated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tag is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)
